lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're not Osman. Who are you?

lines.speaker: Selim
lines.text: My name is Selim. Osman is currently on a diplomatic visit. I expect to be filling in for him for the forseeable future.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay... But where is he really?

lines.speaker: Selim
lines.text: I have told you all that I can.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But who should I take my sq'irk juice to now?

lines.speaker: Selim
lines.text: I am partial to that juice myself. I will happily take any off your hands.

lines.speaker: Selim
lines.text: Now, do you need something?

lines.speaker: Selim
lines.text: Do you need something?

lines.speaker: Selim
lines.text: Like my master, I am partial to juice from the sq'irk fruit. I would appreciate it if you could bring me some.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to talk about sq'irks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have some sq'irk juice for you.

lines.speaker: Selim
lines.text: Thank you very much. If you get some more sq'irks be sure to come back.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I will. It's been a pleasure doing business with you.

lines.speaker: Selim
lines.text: Of course. What would you like to know?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where do I get sq'irks?

lines.speaker: Selim
lines.text: There is a sorceress near the south eastern edge of Al Kharid who grows them. She used to be friends with Osman, but they fell out.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What happened?

lines.speaker: Selim
lines.text: I don't know. All I know is she won't give us any more fruit.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So all I have to do is ask her for some fruit for you?

lines.speaker: Selim
lines.text: I doubt it will be that easy. She is not renowned for her generosity and is very secretive about her garden's location.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh come on, it should be easy enough to find.

lines.speaker: Selim
lines.text: Her garden has remained hidden even from Osman. I believe it must be hidden by magical means.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. And why can't you do this yourself?

lines.speaker: Selim
lines.text: My work requires that I remain here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay. This should be an interesting task.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How should I squeeze the fruit?

lines.speaker: Selim
lines.text: Use a pestle and mortar. Make sure you have an empty glass with you to collect the juice.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there a reward for getting these sq'irks?

lines.speaker: Selim
lines.text: Of course. I'll train you in the art of Thieving for your troubles.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How much training will you give?

lines.speaker: Selim
lines.text: That depends on the quantity and ripeness of the sq'irks you put into the juice.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That sounds fair enough.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's so good about sq'irk juice?

lines.speaker: Selim
lines.text: It is a sweet nectar for a thief or spy. It makes light fingers lighter, fleet feet flightier and comes in four different colours for those who are easily amused.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It wouldn't have addictive properties, would it?

lines.speaker: Selim
lines.text: It only holds power over those with poor self-control. Something which I have an abundance of.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I should go.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you sell me another Keris?

lines.speaker: Selim
lines.text: Would you like a dagger or a partisan?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A dagger.

lines.speaker: Selim
lines.text: That will be 20,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll take one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I don't seem to have enough money on me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's too much.

lines.speaker: Selim
lines.text: Well you know where I am if you reconsider.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A partisan.

lines.speaker: Selim
lines.text: That will be 60,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll take one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I don't seem to have enough money on me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's too much.

lines.speaker: Selim
lines.text: Well you know where I am if you reconsider.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I'm good.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm good, thanks.

lines.speaker: Selim
lines.text: Well done. I have new information to share with you.
